creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sun May 19 05:19:35 2013
New Revision: 318489
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318489

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.0
  - Replace tab->space in pkg-descr
  - Trim header
  
  PR:		ports/178554
  Submitted by:	Radim Kolar <hsn@sendmail.cz> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/databases/py-cql/Makefile
  head/databases/py-cql/distinfo
  head/databases/py-cql/pkg-descr
  head/databases/py-cql/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/py-cql/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-cql/Makefile	Sun May 19 05:09:45 2013	(r318488)
+++ head/databases/py-cql/Makefile	Sun May 19 05:19:35 2013	(r318489)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-cql
-# Date created:		2011-12-14
-# Whom:			Radim Kolar <hsn@fbsd8.localdomain>
-#
+# Created by: Radim Kolar <hsn@sendmail.cz>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	cql
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.10
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	databases python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cassandra-dbapi2.apache-extras.org.codespot.com/files/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-cql/distinfo	Sun May 19 05:09:45 2013	(r318488)
+++ head/databases/py-cql/distinfo	Sun May 19 05:19:35 2013	(r318489)

+SHA256 (cql-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 7857c16d8aab7b736ab677d1016ef8513dedb64097214ad3a50a6c550cb7d6e0
+SIZE (cql-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 76838

==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-cql/pkg-descr	Sun May 19 05:09:45 2013	(r318488)
+++ head/databases/py-cql/pkg-descr	Sun May 19 05:19:35 2013	(r318489)

 Python DB-API 2.0 client interface for Cassandra
 
-WWW:	http://code.google.com/a/apache-extras.org/p/cassandra-dbapi2/
+WWW: http://code.google.com/a/apache-extras.org/p/cassandra-dbapi2/

==============================================================================

+++ head/databases/py-cql/pkg-plist	Sun May 19 05:19:35 2013	(r318489)
@@ -31,5 +31,20 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cassandra/ttypes.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cassandra/Cassandra.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cassandra/Cassandra.pyc

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/native.pyc

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/query.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/thrifteries.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/query.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/apivalues.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/native.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cqltypes.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/thrifteries.pyc

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cqltypes.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/native.py
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql/cassandra
 @dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cql
